_comment: Opportunity: Lost Sword Intent. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 1000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation (sword focus)), perception (Nascent Soul (sword focus, to perceive the intent)), and luck (modifier 1.1). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Lost Sword Intent
description: Residual sword intent left by a fallen sword cultivator. Exists because: sword intent can persist after the cultivator's death.
perception_required: Nascent Soul (sword focus, to perceive the intent)
why_untaken: Requires sword focus to perceive; most cultivators cannot.
natural_next_event: Intent disperses over millennia; eventually fades.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
